e -> 000
 h -> 0010
 i -> 0011
 D -> 0100000000
 q -> 0100000001
 j -> 0100000010
 ) -> 010000001100
 ö -> 0100000011010000000
 ü -> 0100000011010000001
 c -> 0100000011010000010
 % -> 0100000011010000011
 [ -> 01000000110100001
 8 -> 0100000011010001
 Q -> 010000001101001
 2 -> 0100000011010100
 ] -> 01000000110101010
 e -> 010000001101010110
 ä -> 010000001101010111
 / -> 010000001101011
 V -> 0100000011011
 Z -> 010000001110
 i -> 010000001111
 S -> 010000010
 R -> 010000011
 z -> 0100001000
 Y -> 0100001001
 B -> 0100001010
 G -> 01000010110
 * -> 01000010111000
 1 -> 01000010111001
 3 -> 0100001011101000
 4 -> 0100001011101001
 6 -> 01000010111010100
 7 -> 01000010111010101
 ô -> 010000101110101100
 a -> 010000101110101101
 a -> 0100001011101011100
 @ -> 0100001011101011101
 $ -> 0100001011101011110
 î -> 01000010111010111110
 ç -> 01000010111010111111
 J -> 01000010111011
 : -> 010000101111
 T -> 010000110
 H -> 010000111
 . -> 010001
 " -> 01001000
 " -> 01001001
 ' -> 01001010
 O -> 01001011000
 M -> 01001011001
 ; -> 0100101101
 A -> 010010111
 , -> 010011
 n -> 0101
 f -> 011000
 g -> 011001
 l -> 01101
 o -> 0111
 a -> 1000
 c -> 100100
 _ -> 10010100000
 C -> 100101000010
 ' -> 100101000011
 L -> 10010100010
 F -> 100101000110
 E -> 100101000111
 ? -> 100101001
 - -> 100101010
 ! -> 100101011
 k -> 1001011
 d -> 10011
 t -> 1010
 w -> 101100
 y -> 101101
 m -> 101110
 v -> 1011110
 x -> 1011111000
 K -> 101111100100
 é -> 1011111001010000
 0 -> 1011111001010001
 X -> 10111110010100100
 9 -> 10111110010100101
 5 -> 1011111001010011
 U -> 10111110010101
 ( -> 1011111001011
 N -> 10111110011
 P -> 1011111010
 W -> 1011111011
 I -> 10111111
   -> 110
 -> 111000

 -> 111001
 r -> 11101
 b -> 1111000
 p -> 1111001
 u -> 111101
 s -> 11111
